TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nakanu, title = Nakanu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nakanu} }

S.FORM: alang Nakanu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 80 buwan, 273 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 244 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 29 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Nakanu hya' ga Kaminu. tay mkyahu' na Nakanu hya' ga Kalisahan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Nakanu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Nakanu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 80 buwan, 273 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 244 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 29 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Nakanu hya' ga Kaminu. tay mkyahu' na Nakanu hya' ga Kalisahan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Nakanu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč nakanu …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu …£enńße Ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ő≤unun **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na nakanu ńßja Ē …£a kaminu. taj mkjańßu Ē na nakanu ńßja Ē …£a kalis~…ēańßan. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč nakanu …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
